PreCommit.command: bash -c 'CHANGED_SERVICES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- services/ | sed -n "s|^\(services/[^/]*\)/.*|\1|p" | sort -u); for svc in $CHANGED_SERVICES; do MODULE=":$(echo $svc | tr / :)"; echo "Running jacocoTestCoverageVerification for $MODULE"; ./gradlew "${MODULE}:jacocoTestCoverageVerification" || exit 1; done'
